hero.headline: मिथिहोनाय आरो जोथोननि गेजेरजों हिनजावसाफोरखौ गोहो गोनां खालामनाय
hero.subtext: सलोंनो, ट्रेक खालामनो आरो जरायना थानो थाखाय मोनसे रैखाथि गोनां, गावनि जायगा। WHO नि मावखान्थि आरो भारत सरकारनि फुंखाफोरजों मदद होजानाय।

learn.title: हामथाइ सावस्रि सोलोंथाइ
learn.subtitle: मुलुग सावस्रि आफाद (WHO) नि बायदिब्ला, हामथाइ सावस्रिया जोबोर गोनां आरो दिहुनथाइ सावस्रि आरो मोन्थाइफोरनि मोनसे गोनां बाहागो।
learn.basics_content: मोनसे हामथाइ गिदिंखना सरासनस्रायै 21 निफ्राय 35 सानसिम थायो। बेयो मोनसे मिथिंगायारि खान्थि जेराव जोथोना गावनि हाथाखौ गारो।
learn.hygiene_content: बेरामनिफ्राय बासायनो थाखाय गावनि पेद एबा टेम्पोनखौ 4-6 घन्टायाव सोलाय। साफा दै आरो गोरम साबोनजों बायजोआव सुना ला।
learn.myths_content: नंखाय साननाय: नोंथाङा हामथाइ समाव खननाय सुनाय नङा। सैथो: गावनि साफा थानाया जोबोर गोनां, आरो दुगैनाय/खननाय सुनाया थारै रैखाथि गोनां।
learn.nutrition_content: पालें आरो डालि बायदि आइरन गोनां आदारफोरा थै खमायनायखौ सुफुंनो मदद खालामो। सानाय खमायनो थाखाय गोबां दै लों।

tracker.title: गावनि हामथाइ ट्रेकार
tracker.subtitle: नोंथांनि डिभाइसाव गावनि गिदिंखनखौ जायगायारियाव ट्रेक खालाम। नोंथांनि डाटाया नोंथांनि फोननिफ्राय माब्लाबाबो ओंखारना थाङा।
tracker.print_subtitle: दिहुननाय क्लिनिकेल नांथाव रिपर्ट • गुबुननि सिङाव बानायनाय
tracker.cycle_history_subtitle: Track your menstrual cycle consistency and lengths over time.
tracker.cycle_history_empty: Please log at least two periods in the calendar above to see your cycle history chart.
tracker.symptom_correlation_subtitle: See which symptoms occur most frequently during different phases of your cycle.
tracker.symptom_correlation_empty: Log symptoms using the Quick Log or Calendar to visualize your symptom patterns.
tracker.clinical_report_subtitle: Prepared confidentially on device for medical consultation
tracker.heatmap_print_desc: Shows symptom distribution across menstrual cycle phases (normalized percentage within each symptom category).
tracker.print_footer_note: Maa Menstrual Health Tracker is a client-side health tool. All data remains strictly local and private. Sharing this report with your healthcare provider can assist in clinical consultations.

qa.title: मुं गैयै सोंगथि-फिननाय
qa.subtitle: रैखाथियै जेखौबो सों। लगइननि गोनांथि गैया।

schemes.title: सरकारि योजनाफोर आरो फुंखाफोर
schemes.subtitle: सावस्रि आरो नखर कल्याण मन्थ्रायलय (MoHFW) आरो MWCD निफ्राय सरकारि मदद मोन।

footer.disclaimer: बे प्लेटफर्मआ सोलोंथाइआरि मिथिहोनाय होयो आरो बेयो फाहामथायआरि सुबुरुननि सोलाय नङा।
footer.privacy: नोंथांनि प्राइभेसीआ गोनां। जों नोंथांनि गावनि डाटाखौ जेरावबो सार्भाराव ट्रेक एबा दोनथुमा।

hygiene_kit.title: What's in a Hygiene Kit?
hygiene_kit.subtitle: Essential items distributed in rural schools to support menstrual health.

teacher_corner.subtitle: Resources and guidelines for educators to support students.

myth_quiz.title: Myth vs Fact
myth_quiz.subtitle: Click to flip and reveal the truth.

ministry.title: Ministry of Women & Child Development
ministry.subtitle: Official Government of India schemes for women's health, safety, and empowerment. Access support, subsidised products, and crisis helplines.

research.subtitle: Key findings from our published public health reports on menstrual equity.
